title: epipactis labiata
intro: Epipactis labiata, also known as the lip orchid, is a species of orchid found in Europe and Asia, characterized by its distinctive lip-shaped labellum and vibrant purple flowers. Traditionally, Epipactis labiata has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epipactis labiata are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Epipactis labiata is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or decoction, and is often used in traditional folk remedies and supplements.
